changelog: v3.2.9 - Paket Yukseltme modulu (hosting/server/software/special icin ortak)
Her paket icin: ad + aciklama + ozellikler (ilk 5) + period dropdown + buton
Money::formatter_symbol + View::period ile WiseCP fiyat/donem formatlari
Confirmation modal: paket adi + odenecek tutar + bilgi notu
Operation: set_upgrade_product (product_id + pirce_id - WiseCP API typo korundu)
